symmetrical government building with marble facade, Corinthian columns, grand staircase

federal: early American brick townhouse with simple symmetry and restrained ornamentation

dense urban row houses with wood detailing and elaborate cornices

ivy-covered institutional building with lancet windows and vertical emphasis

castle-like civic structure with towers and rusticated stone walls
beaux_arts: grand civic building with elaborate classical ornamentation and symmetry
stone facade with columns, sculptures, arches, and decorative detailing

streamlined facade with decorative patterns and symmetrical composition
brutalist: massive exposed concrete building with blocky geometric forms
monolithic government or university building with repetitive modular structure
raw concrete facade with heavy shadows and minimal decoration

minimalist structure emphasizing simplicity and open space

postmodern: building mixing classical and modern elements in playful composition
colorful facade with exaggerated forms and historical references
ironic use of columns, arches, and mixed materials in 1980s style building

steel frame office tower with curtain wall glass facade
minimalist modern high-rise emphasizing volume and function

low-pitched roof with natural materials and handcrafted details
early 20th century suburban home emphasizing wood and stone craftsmanship
